This family consists of approximately 34 genera, with many species being native to the Americas. Within the Nyctaginaceae family, Allionia floribunda is specifically placed in the genus Allionia. The classification of Allionia floribunda is a way of organizing and understanding its evolutionary relationships with other plants.
